'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 26''' is the twenty-sixth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[June 26]], [[2002]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*Hunt for the Droids
*[[Podracer/Legends|Podracer]] Pilots
*[[Bounty hunter/Legends|Bounty hunters]]
*[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]
*[[Planet/Legends|Planets]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]
*Household Service Droids
*[[E-Web heavy repeating blaster/Legends|E-Web Repeating Blaster]]
*[[Slave I/Legends|Slave I]]
